prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Manthey Racing MR-500 ECU remap** for the **AE31 5.2L twin-turbo V12 (AM28)** engine, optimizing boost pressure to **1.4 bar** (stock: 1.1 bar) with custom ignition timing maps for **750+ HP** and **750 lb-ft torque**, while retaining OEM drivability via **Motec M150** integration for closed-loop fueling and knock control.

Install **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos** with **Inconel 718 turbine wheels** and **3.5-inch V-band downpipes** (ceramic-coated, 409 stainless steel) paired with **Akrapovič Evolution Line Titanium exhaust** (full 3.5-inch diameter, dual-mode valves, and **SCS Delta** mufflers for backpressure optimization).

Fit **Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** with **ASTON-specific valving** (24-click rebound, 22-click compression) and **Eibach ERS Hyperco springs** (front: 120 N/mm, rear: 140 N/mm) alongside **AP Racing CP9660 front brake calipers** (6-piston, 420mm discs) and **Brembo GT-R rear calipers** (4-piston, 380mm discs) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **ATE Type 4 brake fluid** (5.1 boiling point).
estetica: Apply **RML Group’s DBS Superleggera Carbon Edition widebody kit** (pre-preg autoclave carbon fiber, 50mm front/70mm rear fender flares) with **Vorsteiner V-FF107 21-inch forged wheels** (front: 9.5J ET35, rear: 12J ET40, **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R 275/30/21 & 325/30/21**).

Install **Novitec Torado front splitter** (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for DBS chassis) and **Rear diffuser from Prior Design PD-GT80** (dual-layer carbon, integrated **GromTech GT300 side skirts** with active aero flaps for 150kg downforce at 200km/h).

Replace OEM headlights with **Lux HID DBS Superleggera LED Projectors** (CRI 95+, 5500K, **Morimoto XB35 bulbs**) and **Gintani carbon fiber engine cover** (clear-coated, **3K twill weave**) with **custom laser-etched Aston Martin wings** on the plenum.
